{{Infobox concept
| name = Keeper virus
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Keeper virus]] becomes more aggressive in response to [[Aila]]'s accelerated healing.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c13">''The Pilot'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Keeper virus]] is believed to have been engineered by an [[Aether Technician]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Keeper virus]] must be manually reapplied and cannot exist in the wild.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c17">''The Pilot'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
